scene_background: A serene, slightly overcast lakeside setting. The water is calm, reflecting the muted sky. Reeds and tall grass line the immediate bank, with a few distant, indistinct trees on the opposite shore. The overall atmosphere is peaceful and slightly melancholic.

objects.name: The Fisherman
objects.appearance: A weathered, middle-aged man with a kind face, wearing a faded blue fishing vest, a worn-out cap, and practical, dark trousers. He has a short, neatly trimmed beard and a patient demeanor. His fishing rod is a simple, sturdy model.
constraints: Always seated on a small, portable stool or directly on the bank.
His fishing rod is always within reach or actively held.
His attire remains consistent: faded blue vest, worn cap, dark trousers.

objects.name: Fishing Rod
objects.appearance: A simple, sturdy fishing rod with a dark, slightly scuffed handle and a thin, visible line extending into the water. A small, red-and-white bobber is visible on the water's surface.
constraints: Always held by the fisherman or resting beside him.
The line always extends into the water.
The bobber is always visible on the water's surface until a fish is caught.

objects.name: The Caught Fish
objects.appearance: A medium-sized, silver-scaled fish, still slightly wriggling, with clear, unblinking eyes. It appears fresh and healthy.
constraints: Its size is consistent: medium, fitting comfortably in a human hand.
Its color is consistently silver with subtle iridescence.
reveal_rules: Becomes visible only after the fisherman pulls it from the water.
pre_reveal_hints: A sudden tug on the fishing line.
hard_exclusions_before_reveal: The fish itself must not be visible before it is pulled from the water.

objects.name: The Cat
objects.appearance: A sleek, black cat with bright, curious green eyes and a long, swishing tail. It moves with a quiet, graceful stealth.
constraints: Its size is consistent with an average domestic cat.
Its movements are fluid and feline.
reveal_rules: Becomes visible only after the fish is caught and the fisherman acknowledges its presence.
pre_reveal_hints: A rustling in the nearby reeds.
A shadow briefly passing at the edge of the frame.
hard_exclusions_before_reveal: The cat itself must not be visible before the fish is caught and the fisherman looks towards its direction.

style_guide.style: Simple realistic scene, fixed perspective, single shot. The aesthetic is grounded and naturalistic, avoiding overly dramatic or stylized elements. Focus on subtle details and authentic textures.
style_guide.palette: Muted natural tones: soft greens, earthy browns, desaturated blues and grays for the sky and water. A touch of warmth from the fisherman's skin and the red-and-white bobber. The black cat provides a strong, contrasting element.
style_guide.cinematic_intent: To capture a quiet, observational moment of connection between man, nature, and animal. The scene should feel unhurried and intimate, emphasizing the simple pleasure of the interaction. The fixed perspective enhances the feeling of being a silent observer.
style_guide.camera_language: Static, medium-wide shot, maintaining a consistent eye-level perspective throughout the entire scene. The camera remains unmoving, framing the fisherman, the water, and the bank. No zooms, pans, or cuts. Aspect ratio 16:9.
style_guide.lighting_logic: Soft, diffused natural light, consistent with an overcast day. No harsh shadows or direct sunlight. The lighting should be even and gentle, enhancing the peaceful mood. The water should have a subtle, reflective quality.
continuity_bible: The fisherman's position and attire remain unchanged.
The fishing rod's appearance is consistent.
The lake background is stable and unchanging.
The cat's appearance is consistently black with green eyes.
The caught fish is always silver and wriggling.
global_continuity_locks: Fixed camera perspective, no movement or cuts.
Stable background environment (lake, reeds, distant trees).
public_continuity_locks: Fisherman's attire and general appearance are stable.
Fishing rod's design and color are consistent.
Water surface remains calm with subtle reflections.
reveal_locked_traits: The fish is silver-scaled and wriggling.
The cat is sleek black with bright green eyes.
global_negative: Extra fingers, warped anatomy, distorted limbs.
Unstable background details, shifting environmental elements.
Identity drift for characters or objects.
Any elements that break the fixed camera perspective.

story_beats.label: Fisherman waits patiently
story_beats.narrative_function: Establish setting and character, build anticipation.
story_beats.goal: Show the fisherman in his element, patiently waiting for a bite.

story_beats.label: Fish caught
story_beats.goal: Show the fisherman successfully catching a fish.
allowed_hints: A sudden tug on the fishing line.

story_beats.label: Fisherman gives fish to cat
story_beats.goal: Show the fisherman offering the fish to the cat.

frames.action_in_frame: The fisherman sits patiently by the lake, holding his fishing rod with the bobber visible on the calm water.
frames.composition: Rule of thirds, fisherman slightly off-center, water filling the lower half.
frames.blocking: Fisherman seated on the bank, facing the water.
frames.screen_position: Fisherman in the left-mid frame, water and bobber in the right-mid frame.
frames.body_facing: Slightly angled away from camera, towards the water.
frames.gaze_direction: Towards the bobber on the water.

frames.action_in_frame: The fisherman has just pulled a wriggling silver fish from the water, holding it up by the line. His expression is one of mild satisfaction.
frames.composition: Fisherman and fish as focal point, slightly off-center.
frames.blocking: Fisherman has reeled in, holding the fish up.
frames.screen_position: Fisherman in the left-mid frame, fish held higher in the frame.
frames.body_facing: Slightly angled away from camera, looking at the fish.
frames.image_prompt: A single cinematic keyframe. The Fisherman, a weathered, middle-aged man with a kind face, wearing a faded blue fishing vest over a blue denim shirt, a worn-out dark grey cap, and practical, dark olive trousers, is seated on the grassy bank of a calm lake. He has a short, neatly trimmed grey beard and a patient demeanor. He is holding a simple, sturdy fishing rod with a dark, slightly scuffed handle, its thin line extending into the water where a small, red-and-white bobber is visible. The setting is a serene, slightly overcast lakeside with soft, diffused natural light, consistent with an overcast day, casting no harsh shadows. The water is calm, reflecting the muted, light grey sky. Reeds and tall grass line the immediate bank in the foreground, with a few distant, indistinct dark green trees on the opposite shore, creating a peaceful and slightly melancholic atmosphere. The overall color palette is muted and naturalistic, with cool tones dominating. The fisherman is in the left-mid frame, slightly angled away from the camera, looking towards the water with a mild, content expression. The shot is a medium wide, eye-level, static shot, captured with a standard lens on a tripod, maintaining a fixed perspective. The aesthetic is grounded and naturalistic, with subtle details and authentic textures, focusing on a quiet, observational moment. The fisherman's attire, fishing rod, calm lake, and overcast lighting are all consistent with previous frames. The fisherman has just pulled a wriggling silver fish from the water, holding it up by the line, his expression one of mild satisfaction. The fish is medium-sized, silver-scaled, appearing wet and alive, with clear, unblinking eyes.

frames.action_in_frame: The fisherman gently lowers the wriggling fish towards a sleek black cat, which has approached and is looking up expectantly. The cat is positioned near the fisherman's feet.
frames.composition: Fisherman, fish, and cat forming a triangular composition, drawing attention to the interaction.
frames.blocking: Fisherman leaning slightly forward, cat positioned at his feet, looking up.
frames.screen_position: Fisherman left-mid, fish center, cat lower-right.
frames.body_facing: Fisherman angled towards the cat, cat angled towards the fish.
frames.gaze_direction: Fisherman towards cat/fish, cat towards fish.
frames.image_prompt: A cinematic medium wide shot, eye-level, of a weathered, middle-aged man, the Fisherman, with a kind face and neatly trimmed beard, wearing a faded blue fishing vest, a worn-out dark cap, and practical dark trousers. He is seated on the grassy bank of a serene, slightly overcast lakeside, leaning slightly forward. His simple, sturdy fishing rod with a dark, slightly scuffed handle is held in his left hand, and he is gently lowering a medium-sized, silver-scaled, wriggling fish, still appearing wet and alive, towards a sleek black cat with bright, curious green eyes and a long, swishing tail. The cat is positioned at his feet, looking up expectantly at the fish. The water is calm, reflecting the muted, overcast sky. Reeds and tall grass line the immediate bank, with distant, indistinct trees on the opposite shore. The composition forms a triangular shape with the fisherman, fish, and cat, drawing attention to their interaction. The fisherman is positioned left-mid, the fish is center, and the cat is lower-right. The fisherman is angled towards the cat and fish, and the cat is angled towards the fish. The lighting is soft, diffused natural light, consistent with an overcast day, with no harsh shadows or direct sunlight, creating an even and gentle illumination that enhances the peaceful and slightly melancholic mood. The color palette consists of muted natural tones: soft greens for the grass and reeds, earthy browns for the bank, and desaturated blues and grays for the sky and water, with a subtle reflective quality on the water's surface. The black cat provides a strong, contrasting element. The overall aesthetic is grounded and naturalistic, with a focus on subtle details and authentic textures, capturing a quiet, observational moment of connection. The camera is static, maintaining a consistent eye-level perspective, with an aspect ratio of 16:9.

segments.transition_text: The fisherman waits patiently, then feels a tug on his line and reels in a fish.
segments.subject_motion: Fisherman's arm moves to reel in the line, then lifts the fish. Bobber dips and disappears.
segments.environment_motion: Subtle ripples on the water as the line is pulled.
segments.screen_direction_rule: N/A (static camera, subject motion within frame)
segments.gaze_continuity_rule: Fisherman's gaze shifts from bobber to the pulled-in fish.
motion_beats: Fisherman sits still, watching the bobber.
Fisherman reacts, quickly reeling in the line.
Fisherman lifts the wriggling fish from the water.
segments.end_match_notes: The fisherman is holding the fish up, having just pulled it from the water, matching the pose in frame 1.

segments.transition_text: The fisherman holds the fish, then a black cat appears and approaches, prompting the fisherman to offer the catch.
segments.subject_motion: Cat enters frame from the right, walks towards the fisherman. Fisherman lowers the fish towards the cat.
segments.screen_direction_rule: Cat moves right-to-left towards the fisherman.
segments.gaze_continuity_rule: Fisherman's gaze shifts from the fish to the approaching cat, then to the fish as he offers it. Cat's gaze is fixed on the fish.
motion_beats: Fisherman holds the wriggling fish, looking at it.
A sleek black cat subtly enters the frame from the right, moving towards the fisherman's feet.
Fisherman notices the cat, a slight smile forming.
Fisherman gently lowers the fish towards the cat, who looks up expectantly.

hero_presence_transition.cat: enters frame from off screen right, moves to on screen

entry_exit_actions: Cat enters from off screen right.
segments.offscreen_justification: The cat was previously latent, its appearance is a new narrative element.
segments.end_match_notes: The fisherman is leaning forward, offering the fish to the cat, who is looking up at it, matching the composition and interaction in frame 2.
